metric_definition: How many points each offensive play is worth on average. Positive = better than expected. The strongest predictor of wins.
Number of times the defense forced a turnover.
Takeaways minus giveaways. Positive means the team gained the ball more than it lost it.
How many points the defense gives up per play on average. Lower (more negative) = a better defense.
% of offensive plays that kept the team 'on schedule' toward a first down.
% of opponent plays that stayed 'on schedule' against this defense.
% of opponent third-down attempts this defense allowed to be converted.
% of third-down attempts the offense successfully converted into a first down.
Number of times the offense lost the ball via interception or fumble.
Number of penalties committed while on offense.
